history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, selfie-style portrait of a young man with messy brown hair styled forward, a silver nose ring, and a silver cross necklace. He is wearing a black jersey with red and yellow trim around the neckline and large red and yellow lettering on the front. His expression is a playful pout. The background is dimly lit and appears to be a bedroom, with a shelf of books and binders visible on the left and a wardrobe or closet door on the right. The lighting is soft and coming from the front, creating a slightly moody atmosphere. The overall color palette is dominated by dark tones with pops of red and yellow from the jersey. The style is casual and contemporary, with a hint of edgy youthfulness.
